importExport.Name: User Settings
importExport.Label: Import / Export
importExport.Hint: Allows you to import and export custom templates and scripts.

Replace.Title: Replacement
Replace.Hint:
Да: existing templates will be deleted.
No: new templates will be added to existing ones.

importExport.File: Select the file with the user settings

debugMenu.Name: Debug menu
debugMenu.Label: Open
debugMenu.Hint: A tool for correcting module errors.

Reset.Label: Resetting user parameters
Reset.Content: Delete custom templates if they cause errors..
Reset.Hint: Before deleting, it is recommended to save the templates by exporting them to a file.

Update.Label: Update Scripts
Update.Content: Update the item containing the Generator Scripts.
Update.Hint: Use it if you encounter errors when working with them.
Update.Notify: The Generator Scripts have been updated. This does not apply to scripts in already created items.

sellItems.Name: Looting. Allow a quick sale
sellItems.Hint: Allow players to immediately exchange the found items for coins.
sellItems.Error: The game master forbade the quick sale of items.

modifier.Name: Looting. Loot cost Modifier
modifier.Hint: An additional modifier that multiplies the final dice rolls for found coins and the cost of the items. For example, "2" will double the received coins, while "0.5" will halve them.

itemsModifier.Name: Looting. Reduce item value by half
itemsModifier.Hint: If enabled, the monetary reward for found items will be halved after applying the "Looting. Loot cost Modifier".
itemsModifier.Tooltip: The cost of the item has been reduced by half for a quick sale.

editName.Name: Generator. Editor for the name of the generated item
editName.Hint: If enabled, a window will appear when generating an item in which you can change its name.

hideQualities.Name: Generator. Hide qualities
hideQualities.Hint: Hides the basic generator templates that contain only one quality.

hideEffects.Name: Generator. Hide Generator Scripts
hideEffects.Hint: If enabled, the Item Generator Scripts in the finished items will not be visible to the players.

Item.Name: Looting Effects
Item.Description:
This item is needed to store the effects of basic and custom templates.
You can move this item to any folder, rename or modify it, but it will be recreated when deleted.

propsCompatibility.Name: Generator. Compatibility of props
propsCompatibility.Hint: If enabled, when generating an item, the opposite qualities will be mutually exclusive. For example: if you simultaneously receive the qualities "Fine" and "Ugly", they will be excluded.
